player_notes.jalen brunson: Active and performing at high volume — 33 points in Game 3 win; Knicks lead 3-0 and look to close out in Game 4.
player_notes.joel embiid: Returned from injury in Game 3 but 76ers still lost; availability confirmed for Game 4, though team is down 3-0 and facing elimination.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Fully active and dominant — 39 points, 15 rebounds in Game 3 win; no injury concerns, sky-high ceiling on all prop markets.
player_notes.ajay mitchell: Breakout role with Jalen Williams sidelined — posted 24 points and 10 assists in Game 3; elevated usage and minutes expected to continue in Game 4.
player_notes.jalen williams: Out (sidelined) for Thunder vs. Lakers series; Mitchell is filling the offensive void with expanded role.

game_notes.OKC vs LAL: Jalen Williams is out for OKC, boosting Ajay Mitchell's role significantly — factor into points, assists, and 3PM props for Mitchell and SGA.
game_notes.NYK vs PHI: OG Anunoby was out for Knicks in Game 3 (check status for Game 4); Embiid returned for 76ers but team still lost — monitor Anunoby availability as it affects Knicks rotation and opposing player props.

suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add R2 series diary for NYK vs PHI. Update series state to NYK leads 3-0. Note Anunoby was OUT for Game 3 (reason not specified — monitor injury status). Note Embiid returned for PHI Game 3 (this is his R2 debut). Note Brunson is active and scoring at a high level.
